backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the barcode label printing backend with print job submission, serial deduplication, label settings management per user, and role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features recorded.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files describing each component, hook, store, and service in the application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'Make Some Double!! Barcode & Label Printing System' that mounts the app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component wrapping the app in ErrorBoundary and PasswordSessionProvider, rendering LockScreen when locked or AppShell when unlocked, with special handling for password session wiring errors.
frontend/src/audio/soundSystem.ts: Zustand-persisted sound settings store with Web Audio API beep generation and custom audio file playback for success, error, and print-complete sound events.
frontend/src/auth/passwordSession.ts: Password session utilities handling creation, retrieval, expiry validation, and password verification against the configured expected password, persisted in localStorage with an 8-hour TTL.
frontend/src/auth/PasswordSessionProvide: React context provider managing password session state, rehydrating from localStorage on mount and exposing unlock/lock actions with password validation.
frontend/src/components/AppShell.tsx: Main application shell component that renders the header (with logo, backend status, device controls, and lock button), a four-tab navigation (Scan & Print, Label Settings, Devices, Diagnostics), and a footer.
frontend/src/components/BackendAvailabil: Displays a destructive badge when the backend is unavailable; renders nothing when the backend is reachable.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React class-based error boundary that catches unhandled render errors and shows a fallback UI with a page-refresh button.
frontend/src/components/HeaderDeviceCont: Header component showing printer connection status badge and an optional wake-lock toggle switch.
frontend/src/components/SerialTypeCounte: Displays per-prefix print count cards derived from diagnostics state and label settings prefix mappings, with an empty state when no mappings are configured.
frontend/src/components/SoundEffectsSett: Settings UI for configuring sound effects (success, error, print complete) with built-in/custom sound selection, file upload, test playback, and volume control.
frontend/src/config/lockScreenConfig.ts: Exports a function that returns the lock screen password, defaulting to 'swh1400' but overridable via the VITE_LOCK_PASSWORD build-time environment variable.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query mutations and queries for submitting print jobs, fetching print history, and incrementing print counts, with backend availability tracking and IC error formatting.
frontend/src/hooks/useWakeLock.ts: React hook that manages the Screen Wake Lock API, persisting the user's preference to localStorage and re-requesting the lock when the page becomes visible again.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining a dark warehouse-themed design system with CSS custom properties for colors, minimum touch target sizes, and focus/validation states.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/printing/barcodePreview.ts: Generates a deterministic SVG barcode pattern from a string value without an external library, producing alternating black bars whose widths are derived from character codes.
frontend/src/printing/cpclBarcodeDiagnos: Provides validation and diagnostic logging utilities for CPCL barcode generation, checking data content, position bounds, and height constraints and emitting structured log entries.
frontend/src/printing/cpclBarcodeMapping: Maps UI barcode type strings (e.g. CODE128, EAN13) to their CPCL printer tokens and recommended width/ratio parameters, with a CODE128 fallback for unknown types.
frontend/src/printing/cpclGenerator.ts: Generates CPCL command strings for label printing, including production labels, test prints, and calibration patterns, with scale clamping, barcode height calculation, and diagnostic logging.
frontend/src/printing/cpclLayoutAdjustme: Provides utilities to clamp barcode X positions within safe printable margins and estimate CODE128 barcode widths in dots to prevent label edge clipping.
frontend/src/printing/LabelPreview.tsx: React component that renders a live visual preview of a label at adjustable zoom, converting mm/dot layout settings and offsets to pixels and generating barcode SVGs for two serial numbers.
frontend/src/printing/previewUnits.ts: Defines shared constants and conversion functions for translating between millimeters, printer dots (203 DPI), and CSS pixels for preview rendering.
frontend/src/screens/LockScreen.tsx: Renders a password entry screen that gates access to the app, using the PasswordSessionProvider's unlock function and auto-focusing the input on mount.
frontend/src/screens/PasswordSessionWiri: Displays a static error screen when the password session system is misconfigured, offering the user a page-refresh button.
frontend/src/services/printerService.ts: Zustand store managing USB printer connection state, providing connect/disconnect/sendCPCL/testPrint actions via the WebUSB transport layer.
frontend/src/services/usbCpclTransport.t: WebUSB transport layer that handles device discovery, opening, endpoint detection, and bulk data transfer for CPCL-compatible USB label printers.
frontend/src/state/backendAvailabilitySt: Zustand store tracking whether the backend is reachable, with actions to mark it as available, stopped, or reset.
frontend/src/state/diagnosticsStore.ts: Persisted Zustand store that tracks scan, print, and error counts globally and per label-type prefix, with exported action helpers.
frontend/src/state/labelSettingsStore.ts: Zustand store with localStorage persistence for label settings (dimensions, barcode layouts, calibration offsets), including BigInt serialization handling and a migration function for legacy settings.
frontend/src/state/logStore.ts: Zustand store with persistence that maintains a capped list of up to 1000 log entries (info/warn/error) and exposes an addLog helper and useLogs hook.
frontend/src/state/printHistoryStore.ts: Zustand store with persistence that tracks the last 1000 print history entries and provides a reprint function that resends stored CPCL data to the printer.
frontend/src/state/useLabelSettingsHydra: React hook that tracks whether the label settings Zustand persist store has finished rehydrating from localStorage, returning a boolean hasHydrated flag.
frontend/src/tabs/DevicesTab.tsx: UI tab for managing USB printer connections, displaying connection status, and triggering test prints, with warnings for unsupported browsers or Bluetooth.
frontend/src/tabs/DiagnosticsTab.tsx: UI tab showing three sub-tabs: scan/print statistics with per-prefix counters, print history with reprint capability, and a filterable system log viewer.
frontend/src/tabs/LabelSettingsTab.tsx: UI tab for configuring label layout settings (dimensions, barcode positions, prefix mappings, calibration offsets) with import/export, live preview, and test-print functionality.
frontend/src/tabs/ScanPrintTab.tsx: UI tab implementing a two-step barcode scan-and-print workflow: validates left/right serial inputs against prefix mappings, generates CPCL, submits to backend, and sends to the connected printer.
frontend/src/utils/barcodeSettingsValida: Validates barcode and label layout settings (type, scale, height, position, overlap, bounds) against CPCL-supported types and physical label dimensions, returning a user-friendly error string or null.
frontend/src/utils/icErrors.ts: Detects and formats Internet Computer replica errors, specifically handling IC0508 'canister is stopped' errors and cleaning up verbose rejection messages for user-facing display.
frontend/src/utils/labelSettingsErrors.t: Parses label settings update errors and maps them to user-friendly messages, covering canister stopped, authorization, network, duplicate serial, and unknown prefix cases.
frontend/src/utils/labelSettingsImportEx: Handles serialization/deserialization of label settings to/from JSON (with BigInt support), including migration from old settings structures and validation via barcodeSettingsValidation.
frontend/src/utils/labelTypes.ts: Defines built-in label types, utilities to extract custom types from prefix mappings, and a function to get all available label types sorted with built-ins first.
frontend/src/utils/scanPrintErrors.ts: Formats Scan & Print backend submission and printer errors into concise user-facing strings, and identifies non-blocking backend errors (e.g., canister stopped) where printing can still proceed.
frontend/src/utils/serialNormalization.t: Normalizes scanned serial number strings by trimming whitespace and stripping trailing CR/LF/Tab characters commonly appended by barcode scanners.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive parameters from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, accordion animations, and enabling the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state (version 3) for a label printing/barcode scanning app, listing pending feature requests: fixing barcode width to fit label boundaries, adding a user-adjustable barcode width setting, and enforcing unique serial validation with audio feedback on duplicate scans.
